name: hydrosense
description: Water management system with React frontend and Laravel backend

scripts.dev:install: cd frontend && npm install && npm start
scripts.backend:start: echo Legacy Docker backend is not part of the current Vercel API architecture.
scripts.backend:stop: echo Legacy Docker backend is not part of the current Vercel API architecture.
scripts.backend:logs: echo Legacy Docker backend is not part of the current Vercel API architecture.
scripts.backend:migrate: echo Legacy Docker backend is not part of the current Vercel API architecture.
scripts.vercel-build: npm install --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend
